name: parallel runner: --max-old-space-mb 64 sets V8 heap limit per worker; over-budget worker is restarted with diagnostic
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rule-engine/cli.sh" --rule allocate-1gb --in "$PWD/src/**/*.js" --concurrency 1 --max-old-space-mb 64 2>out.txt && grep -E 'worker.*restarted|heap' out.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
